overview: Dadi Institute of Engineering and Technology (DIET), established in 2006, is a prominent private autonomous institution located in Anakapalle, Visakhapatnam. Sponsored by the Sarada Educational Trust, the institute is dedicated to empowering rural youth through high-quality technical education. It operates as a self-financing college and has emerged as a preferred destination for engineering and management studies in the North Coastal region of Andhra Pradesh.
accreditation: UGC Autonomous status. Accredited by NAAC with an 'A' Grade. Approved by AICTE and UGC under sections 2(f) & 12(B). Affiliated with JNTU-Gurajada, Vizianagaram (JNTU-GV).

coursesAndFees.course: B.Tech (CSE, AI&ML, Data Science, ECE, EEE, Civil)
coursesAndFees.eligibility: 10+2 with 45% aggregate in PCM + AP EAPCET rank
Graduation with 50% aggregate + AP ICET rank
Bachelor's degree with 50% aggregate + AP ICET rank

coursesAndFees.course: M.Tech (CSE, Systems & Signals Processing, Power & Industrial Drives)
coursesAndFees.eligibility: B.E./B.Tech in relevant branch + GATE/AP PGECET score

admissions.admissionProcess: Admissions are conducted via state-level web counseling (APSCHE). 70% of seats (Category A) are filled through entrance exam ranks. 30% are Management Quota (Category B) seats filled based on merit or JEE scores. Lateral entry for diploma holders is through AP ECET.
admissions.importantDates: AP EAPCET 2026 Engineering: May 12–15 & 18, 2026; AP ICET 2026 Result: May 16, 2026; Counseling: July–August 2026.

campus.area: Modern integrated campus on National Highway 16
facilities: Separate Hostels for Boys and Girls
campus.specialNote: DIET is recognized as a 'Band-Performer' in ARIIA rankings for private technical institutes. It features specialized research centers and maintains a strong 'Training and Placement Cell' that provides intensive CRT (Campus Recruitment Training) to students from the third year onwards.

contact.address: National Highway 16, Anakapalle, Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh - 531002
